name: Angela's Squid Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Italian plum tomatoes (peeled and coarsely chopped)
1 pound Squid (cleaned, tentacles intact and cut into bite-size pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter or oil in a large saucepan.
2. Add tomatoes and onions and cook for 20 minutes over medium heat, stirring occasionally until the tomatoes break apart easily and onion is soft.
3. Add squid, reduce heat to low, and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until squid is very tender.
4. Stir in herbs (thyme, oregano, marjoram, basil) and cook for another 5 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve the sauce over pasta.
